surface-primary.purpose: Page background across all routes. The cream paper the system prints onto.

surface-elevated.purpose: Inverted CTAs, newsletter input fill, product-frame highlights. Reserved.

ink-primary.purpose: Body text, primary CTA fill, hairline dividers at 10% alpha. Carries 95% of voice.

ink-inverse.purpose: Text on dark surfaces: image overlays, inverted CTA hover state, product-tag text.

neutral-mid.purpose: Secondary metadata, marketplace labels, 'collection' pretitles. Never primary text.

overlay-scrim.purpose: Hero image gradient overlay; only place ink appears as a semi-opaque wash.

display.purpose: Blacksword decorative serif. The wordmark only. One instance per page.

headline.purpose: Playfair Display serif. Section heads, product names, collection titles.

title.purpose: Avenir sans. Card titles, footer column heads, newsletter heading.

body.purpose: AvenirThin/Avenir. Marketing copy, narrative, product descriptions. Cap at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Helvetica Neue uppercase, 13px, 0.092em tracking. Every CTA, nav link, badge.

motion.name: ease-signature
motion.purpose: The single ease curve. Used for every transition, hover, page entrance, magnetic interaction.

motion.name: duration-color
motion.purpose: Color and opacity state changes (nav hover, CTA hover, link active).

motion.name: duration-image
motion.purpose: Image cross-fades (product card default → hover), CTA slide-up reveal.

motion.name: duration-scale
motion.purpose: Image scale on hover (mega-menu thumbs scale 1.05).

motion.name: duration-entrance
motion.purpose: Page entrance, scroll-reveal, hero text animate-up. The longest motion allowed.

motion.name: magnetic-scale-hover
motion.purpose: whileHover transform on primary CTAs and product cards.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid ink block, white text, square. Inverts on hover. The site's confident voice.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #050505; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #050505; padding: 12px 40px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.23; letter-spacing: 0.092em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ffffff; color: #050505; transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #050505; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Inverse Button
components.description: Cream-on-ink reverse, sits on dark image overlays (hero CTA). Inverts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-inverse { background: #ffffff; color: #050505; border: 1px solid #ffffff; padding: 11px 36px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.23; letter-spacing: 0.154em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-btn-inverse:hover { background: #050505; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-inverse:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Link
components.description: Uppercase nav link / 'discover more' inline action. No background, no border.
components.css: .ds-link-ghost { display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: #050505; padding: 4px 8px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.23; letter-spacing: 0.092em; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-link-ghost:hover { color: rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.6); } .ds-link-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #050505; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Underline Input
components.description: Transparent fill, bottom hairline. Border darkens on focus. Used in forms.
components.css: .ds-input-underline-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-input-underline-label { font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.35em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.6); } .ds-input-underline { width: 100%; background: transparent; color: #050505; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.2); padding: 12px 0; font-family: 'AvenirThin', 'Avenir', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.65; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border-radius: 0; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-input-underline::placeholder { color: rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.35); } .ds-input-underline:focus-visible { border-bottom-color: #050505; outline: none; }

components.name: Newsletter Filled Input
components.description: White-fill input with attached send button. The footer subscribe pattern.
components.html: <form class="ds-newsletter"><input class="ds-newsletter-input" type="email" placeholder="E-posta adresiniz" /><button class="ds-newsletter-send" aria-label="Abone ol"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="22" y1="2" x2="11" y2="13"></line><polygon points="22 2 15 22 11 13 2 9 22 2"></polygon></svg></button></form>
components.css: .ds-newsletter { display: flex; max-width: 28rem; } .ds-newsletter-input { flex: 1; background: #ffffff; color: #050505; border: 1px solid rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.2); padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'AvenirThin', 'Avenir', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border-radius: 0; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-newsletter-input::placeholder { color: rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.4); } .ds-newsletter-input:focus-visible { border-color: rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.6); } .ds-newsletter-send { background: #050505; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #050505; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 0; transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-newsletter-send:hover { background: rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.9); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-newsletter-send:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-newsletter-send:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #050505; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Product Tag
components.description: Top-left badge on product cards. Tiny uppercase label, ink-on-ink-inverse.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; background: #050505; color: #ffffff; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: 0.35em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 0; }

components.name: Product Card Frame
components.description: Framed product photograph (3:4) with gradient substrate. The site's signature module.
components.html:
BUSINESSMAN

BUSINESSMAN

Elegant

Zamansız bir imza için odun ve ferah notalar.
components.css: .ds-product-card { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .ds-product-frame { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 3 / 4; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(107deg, rgba(89, 89, 89, 0.20) 0%, rgba(89, 89, 89, 0.03) 100%); margin-bottom: 24px; } .ds-product-image { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-image { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-product-card-tag { position: absolute; top: 16px; left: 16px; background: #050505; color: #ffffff; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.35em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-product-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-product-pretitle { font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.35em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #686868; margin: 0; } .ds-product-name { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; color: #050505; margin: 0; transition: color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-name { color: #686868; } .ds-product-desc { font-family: 'AvenirThin', 'Avenir', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.5; color: #686868; margin: 0; }

components.name: Mega-Menu Category Thumb
components.description: Category thumbnail in the header mega-menu. Smaller sibling of product card.
components.html:
Elegant

Zamansız imza.
components.css: .ds-mega-thumb { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .ds-mega-frame { aspect-ratio: 3 / 4; margin-bottom: 12px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; background: linear-gradient(107deg, rgba(89, 89, 89, 0.15) 0%, rgba(89, 89, 89, 0.03) 100%); } .ds-mega-image { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-mega-thumb:hover .ds-mega-image { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-mega-name { font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.23; letter-spacing: 0.092em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #050505; margin: 0 0 2px 0; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1); } .ds-mega-thumb:hover .ds-mega-name { color: rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.6); } .ds-mega-desc { font-family: 'AvenirThin', 'Avenir', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: rgba(5, 5, 5, 0.4); margin: 0; }

components.name: Wordmark
components.description: The Blacksword 'Mr. Okay' signature. One per page.
components.css: .ds-wordmark { font-family: 'Blacksword', Georgia, serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0; color: #050505; }

narrative.overview: Mr. Okay is a parfümerie storefront that behaves like a Margiela Replica white-label rack crossed with a quiet apothecary. Surfaces are warm paper, ink is near-black, edges are sharp. Every koku gets the same modular label treatment; hierarchy comes from sequence and breathing room, not from sparkle or scale. The aesthetic explicitly rejects three lanes: Chanel-era luxury clichés, generic Turkish e-commerce chrome, and SaaS-cream pastel gradients. Tactile and confident at the component level; hushed at the layout level.
keyCharacteristics: Cream warm paper surface (#faf9f6); pure white reserved for inverted CTAs and elevated product frames
Near-black ink (#050505) carries 95% of text load; mid-gray (#686868) for secondary support only
Sharp corners throughout (border-radius: 0); circular only for social-media icon medallions
One decorative serif (Blacksword) for the wordmark; Playfair Display + Avenir do the working typography
Label typography is Helvetica Neue, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.092em — the Guerlain register
Motion uses a single ease curve (cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1)); durations stair-step from 300ms (color) to 800ms (entrances)
Elevation is flat; depth comes from 1px hairline borders at rgba(0,0,0,0.1) and tonal layering of cream over white

rules.name: The Two-Tone Rule
rules.body: Cream and ink. That is the palette. A third color does not enter the system without an Editorial board meeting. Hover states invert (cream→ink, ink→cream); they do not introduce new hues.

rules.name: The Cream-Default Rule
rules.body: Pure white (#ffffff) appears only as inverted CTAs, the newsletter input fill, and the product-frame highlight. The page surface is always cream. If a section wants 'more white', the answer is more whitespace, not a whiter color.

rules.name: The No-Accent Rule
rules.body: There is no brand accent color. No magenta, no gold, no teal, no Trendyol red. The product photograph is the accent; the interface holds still while the photograph does the work.

rules.name: The One-Wordmark Rule
rules.body: Blacksword appears exactly once per page: the wordmark. Never section heads, never product names, never decoration. It is the brand signature, not a font.

rules.name: The Uppercase-Label Rule
rules.body: Every CTA, navigation link, badge, and pretitle is uppercase Helvetica Neue with ≥0.05em letter-spacing. Title-case CTAs ('Discover Now') are forbidden; they read as e-commerce default-template.

rules.name: The 65-Character Rule
rules.body: Body copy paragraphs do not exceed 75 characters of line length on desktop.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: box-shadow is forbidden. If something needs to feel 'lifted', layer a surface-elevated (#ffffff) block onto the cream surface or add a hairline border. If those don't read, the element doesn't need to be lifted.

rules.name: The Hairline-Only Rule
rules.body: Dividers, panel edges, dropdown outlines: always 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1). No 2px borders, no colored borders, no border-left accents. Side-stripe borders are absolutely banned.

dos: Do use surface-primary (#faf9f6) as the page background on every new route. Cream is the default.
Do invert hover states (ink↔cream) rather than introducing new hover colors.
Do keep all buttons, inputs, cards, modals, and frames square (border-radius: 0). Circular shape is reserved for social-media icon medallions only.
Do use the label typography (Helvetica Neue, uppercase, 0.092em letter-spacing, 13px) for every CTA, nav link, badge, and pretitle.
Do use the single ease curve cubic-bezier(0.23, 1, 0.32, 1) for motion. Pick a duration from {300ms color, 500ms image, 700ms scale, 800ms entrance}.
Do lift elements with tonal layering (#ffffff over cream) or hairline borders (1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)), not shadows.
Do cap body copy line length at 65-75ch.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce on every Framer Motion animation, scroll-reveal, magnetic-button, and parallax.
donts: Don't introduce a brand accent color (no magenta, no gold, no teal, no Trendyol red). The site is two-tone.
Don't use Chanel-era lux clichés: gold scrollwork, marble texture, italic script gilded headlines.
Don't add generic Turkish e-com chrome: red discount badges, popup timers, 'stoklar tükeniyor' overlays.
Don't import SaaS-cream + dijital-luxury hybrid styling: soft gradient cards, neutral-purple AI palettes, 'modern startup' rounded-2xl everything.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. The current .text-gradient-silver utility violates the absolute ban on gradient text.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-filter: blur). The .glass / .glass-light utilities should be deleted.
Don't use box-shadow for elevation. None exists today; none should be added.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent. Side-stripe borders are absolutely banned.
Don't title-case CTAs ('Discover Now'). Labels are uppercase with letter-spacing.
Don't rely on font-serif (Playfair Display) alone for the wordmark. The wordmark is Blacksword.
Don't use em-dashes in UI copy. Use commas, colons, periods, or parentheses.
